meta.description: EDEN Flight Rules Engine — Layer 0 deterministic protocols. Execute in 0ms. Cannot be overridden by AI agents.
meta.priority_order: Human safety > Crop survival > Resource conservation > Optimization

rules.action: SEAL all zones. ALERT crew CRITICAL. Enter EMERGENCY mode. Suspend all non-essential systems.
ALERT crew CRITICAL. Activate O2 reserve. Increase plant lighting to maximize photosynthesis.
ALERT crew WARNING. Activate ventilation scrubbers. Reduce crew dome time if > 10000 ppm.
Activate zone heater to MAX. ALERT: frost risk. If < 5C for > 1 hour, initiate emergency harvest of vulnerable crops.
Activate emergency cooling. Increase ventilation. Reduce lighting to lower heat load.
ALERT: Spinach bolting risk. Reduce zone temp immediately. If > 25C for > 4 hours, trigger emergency spinach harvest.
rules.source: Syngenta KB: leafy greens heat threshold 25C

rules.action: Activate root zone heater. Nutrient uptake impaired below 15C. Monitor EC drift.
RATION mode: suspend all non-critical irrigation. Prioritize by salvageability score. ALERT crew.
CRITICAL RATION: irrigate only CRITICAL-priority crops. All zones enter survival mode. Request crew intervention.
Irrigate immediately. This crop is at wilting point.
Suspend irrigation for zone. Risk of root hypoxia. Increase aeration.
ALERT: Desalination underperforming. Check membrane. Initiate water conservation protocol.
Activate radiation shields. Reduce non-essential power. ALERT crew: limit EVA.
CRITICAL: Full shield deployment. Zone isolation. Suspend all non-life-critical systems. Power priority: shields > heating > water.
ALERT: Flowering crops under radiation stress. Activate shields. Stress-harden nutrient mix: increase EC by 0.4 mS/cm.
rules.source: Syngenta KB: yield reduction 15-40% under UV-B during flowering

rules.action: ALERT: Pressure dropping. Check seals. If < 400 hPa, trigger FR-S-001.
Vent excess pressure. Check CO2 injection system.
Enter low-power lighting mode. Prioritize light to flowering/fruiting crops. Reduce light to vegetative crops by 50%.
Supplement artificial lighting. Flowering requires DLI > 12 mol/m²/day minimum.
Reduce lighting. Excess DLI causes light stress and wastes power.
Nutrient lockout risk. Flush and recalibrate nutrient solution. Target: pH 5.5-6.5.
Nutrient solution depleted. Replenish macro/micronutrients. Monitor new leaf color for N deficiency.
Nutrient concentration too high. Dilute with clean water. Risk of salt stress and root burn.
Nitrogen deficiency indicated. Increase N in nutrient solution. Monitor recovery in 48h.
Potassium deficiency indicated. Supplement K. Check for salt buildup (high EC may cause K lockout).
Iron deficiency indicated. Supplement chelated Fe. Check pH — Fe locks out above 6.5.
CO2 below optimal for photosynthesis. Increase CO2 injection. Target: 800-1200 ppm.
CO2 excess. Reduce injection. Check for crew breathing comfort.
Fungal risk. Activate ventilation cycle. Increase air circulation. Monitor for mold.
Low humidity. Increase misting. VPD above optimal range — transpiration stress likely.
VPD above optimal. Plants transpiring too fast. Increase humidity or reduce temperature.
VPD below optimal. Poor transpiration. Risk of edema and nutrient transport issues. Reduce humidity.
LOW POWER mode. Shutdown non-critical lighting. Heating to minimum safe. Desal suspended until solar recovery.
CRITICAL POWER. Only life support and heating. All grow lights OFF. ALERT crew: manual intervention may be needed.
Dust storm or equipment failure. Enter survival mode. Priority: heating > shields > water > minimal lighting.
Calculate Mars ETA. If < 72h: convene Council. If < 24h: immediate pre-storm protocol.
Begin pre-storm water stockpiling. Desal to MAX. Battery charge priority. Pre-water all crops to saturation.
IMMINENT IMPACT. Full shield deployment. Pre-harvest all vulnerable crops. Zone isolation. Emergency crop assessment.
Fast CME with flowering crops. Pre-harvest adjacent leafy greens. Stress-harden flowering crops: increase EC +0.4 mS/cm. Shield priority.
Begin recovery protocol. Gradual light restoration. Resume normal irrigation. Run post-event simulation. Compare predicted vs actual. Propose rule updates.
Potato heat stress. Tuber initiation impaired above 25-28C. Activate cooling priority for carb zone.
Bean/legume heat stress threshold reached. Emergency cooling. Monitor for flower drop.
Consumption outpacing production. Review crop water budgets. Reduce lowest-priority zone irrigation by 20%.
Crop health critical. Run triage evaluation. If salvageability < 0.3, mark EXPECTANT and reallocate resources.
CrashLoopBackOff: This crop variety is failing in current conditions. Try different growth parameters. If still fails, switch to alternative crop variety.
Extended reduced solar. Zone isolation protocol. Suspend cross-zone resource sharing. Each zone operates on local budget.
QUARANTINE affected zone immediately. Suspend cross-zone air circulation. ALERT crew. Do NOT attempt treatment until pathogen identified.
Escalate to CRITICAL priority. Crew may be unable to respond. Attempt autonomous workaround.
Blossom end rot risk for tomatoes. Increase calcium in nutrient solution. Improve air circulation in fruit zone.
Excessive photoperiod for short-day crops. Reduce to 14-16h. Risk of delayed flowering.
